name: Deploy
run-name: "Deploy ${{ github.ref_name }} → ${{ inputs.target }}"

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - '*'
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      target:
        description: 'Environment to deploy to'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - oldone
          - newone

jobs:
  check-tag:
    if: github.ref_type == 'tag'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: echo "Releasing ${{ github.ref_name }} to ${{ inputs.target }}"

  build:
    needs: check-tag
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: ${{ inputs.target }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v5
        
      - name: Build
        run: |
          echo "Building image for ${{ github.ref_name }}..."
          echo "AWS_GH_ROLE=${{ vars.AWS_GH_ROLE }}"
          echo "ECR_REGISTRY=${{ vars.ECR_REGISTRY }}"
          echo "Image tag: ${{ vars.ECR_REGISTRY }}/pos:${{ github.ref_name }}"

  deploy:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: ${{ inputs.target }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v5

      - name: Deploy
        run: |
          echo "Deploying ${{ github.ref_name }} to ${{ inputs.target }}..."
          echo "ECS_CLUSTER_NAME=${{ vars.ECS_CLUSTER_NAME }}"
          echo "CUSTOMVALUE=${{ vars.CUSTOMVALUE }}"
